original_question:
Given that $f(x)$ is an odd function on $\mathbb{R}$, and $f(x+2)=-f(x)$, when $x \in (0,2)$, $f(x)=2x^2$, find the value of $f(11)$.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
